title: keraselma diversifolium
intro: Keraselma diversifolium, also known as the Bearberry or Keraselma plant, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to Northern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Keraselma diversifolium include treating urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and digestive problems, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, often used in teas, capsules, and topical creams for its medicinal properties.
